name: Retrolink/DragonRise SNES USB Controller
notes: 50-byte descriptor. Source: Linux kernel hid-dr.c pid0011_rdesc_fixed[] array. This is the FIXED descriptor -- the original hardware descriptor is 101 bytes but badly broken (duplicates Usage(X) for all axes). Represented as DVTech PC JS19, Retrolink SNES, and other retro-style USB pads. 2 axes (X/Y), 10 buttons, 3 constant bytes + 10 constant bits for padding.
